sentences.english: British people are obsessed with queuing properly.
If you skip the queue, people will give you angry looks.
In my country, there's no real concept of queuing, and people just push to the front.
sentences.korean: 우리나라에는 줄 서기 개념이 없고 사람들이 그냥 앞으로 밀고 가요.

sentences.english: I hate waiting in line, so I try to go to places during off-peak hours whenever possible.
sentences.korean: 줄 서서 기다리는 게 싫어서 가능하면 한산한 시간에 가려고 해요.
